Zhen De (Yansun) з”„еҫ· (еҪҘеӯ«)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhen De (з”„еҫ·), styledYansun (еҪҘеӯ«). Said to be pure in terms of quality. Zhen De was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
